hooks.command: echo 'FRUGAL ROUTING ACTIVE — apply this policy to every task, every response. No drift:'; awk '/^---$/{c++; next} c>=2' "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/skills/routing/SKILL.md"; python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/stats.py" --advice 2>/dev/null || true

echo 'FRUGAL ROUTING ACTIVE — one-shot deterministic tool first, then cheapest capable agent (scout/extractor -> mechanic/builder -> main loop). Bright line: 3+ inline search/list/read operations on one question = you are exploring inline, delegate to scout/extractor instead. Escalate only on verified failure.'
